name: M:GTA.Math.Quaternion.Euler(GTA.Math.Vector3)
summary: Returns a rotation that rotates z degrees around the z axis, x degrees around the x axis, and y degrees around the y axis (in that order).

params.name: euler
params.description: Euler angles in degrees. euler.X = around X axis, euler.Y = around Y axis, euler.Z = around Z axis
